summary: System page PR passes all checks. Tests green, build clean, no design token violations, no App.tsx regression.

checks.build: PASS — vite build clean, 447kB JS bundle
checks.design_tokens: PASS — no hardcoded hex colors in system components
checks.tailwind_config: PASS — tailwind.config.js not modified (no new palette entries)

findings.note: openclaw-gateway hardcoded as always-forbidden (compatibility guard). This is intentional per spec.
crontab writes via stdin pipe — correct approach, avoids shell injection
CPU sampling uses two /proc/stat reads 200ms apart — correct delta approach
